columns.name: Kode
columns.description: Code for the type of handling or treatment

columns.name: Navn
columns.description: Name of the handling or treatment

columns.name: KodeFullLagring
columns.description: Full storage code for the handling or treatment

columns.name: AvvikendeDatoPris
columns.description: Override date used in price calculation (J if the part's date should be used)

columns.name: RenterForsOppgjor
columns.description: Indicate whether late payment interest should be calculated (N if not)

columns.name: AvvistVKFMPris
columns.description: Indicates that only this price plus VAT is applied for rejected parts with quality issues (J if applicable)

columns.name: EkstraTekstOppgjorBrev
columns.description: Extra text for the invoice, only used for specific handling or treatment codes

columns.name: Forskudd
columns.description: Indicates whether advance payment should be registered (J if yes)

columns.name: VenteDagerAvregning
columns.description: Indicates that parts must wait a minimum number of days before settlement (J if applicable)

columns.name: DagerRedusertTermintill
columns.description: Number of days reduced from the term extension date

columns.name: Etterbetaling
columns.description: Indicates whether this code is for post-payment of additional clauses (J if yes)

columns.name: TilDataflyt
columns.description: Indicates that the invoice with this code should be sent to data flow (J if yes)
